{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Enkai's knife
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Enkai possesses a twisted green-tipped knife that is a [[Highgold]] treasure.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1">''Ghostwater'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
